    A

    ACCOUNT_NOT_CONFIRMED - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationReason
    The forum account is linked but hasn't been email-confirmed yet.
    ACCOUNT_NOT_CONFIRMED - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model.VerificationReason
    The forum account is linked but not confirmed (e.g., email not verified).
    addStrike(UUID) - Method in class net.sylphian.verify.paper.manager.VerifyManager
    Records a 'strike' (technical failure) for a player and checks if the limit is reached.
    addStrike(UUID) - Method in class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.manager.VerifyManager
    Adds a strike (technical failure) for a player and returns if the max limit was reached.

    Returns the value of the allowed record component.
    allowed() - Method in record class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.model.VerificationResult
    Returns the value of the allowed record component.

    Creates a successful verification result.
    allowed(PlayerIdentity) - Static method in record class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.model.VerificationResult
    Creates an allowed result.
    amount(int) - Method in class net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.util.ItemBuilder
     
    API_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationReason
    A technical error occurred while communicating with the API.
    API_ERROR - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model.VerificationReason
    An internal technical error occurred while contacting the verification API.
    API_FAILURE_NO_MESSAGE - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationReason
    API call returned a failure status but provided no specific error message.
    API_FAILURE_NO_MESSAGE - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model.VerificationReason
    The API reported a failure but provided no specific error message.
    API_SUCCESS_NO_DATA - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationReason
    API call returned 200 OK but the data payload was missing.
    API_SUCCESS_NO_DATA - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model.VerificationReason
    The API returned success but without the expected player data.
    ApiEnvelope<T> - Class in net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model
    Represents a standard API response envelope from the XenForo/Sylphian API.
    ApiEnvelope<T> - Class in net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model
    Standard API response envelope used across the Sylphian network.

    Attempts to apply all registered and enabled mutations to a caught fish.

    BRUTE_FORCE_BLOCKED - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationReason
    Too many failed attempts detected; the account is temporarily blocked.
    BRUTE_FORCE_BLOCKED - Enum constant in enum class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.api.model.VerificationReason
    Access blocked due to too many failed attempts from this identity or IP.

    Finalizes the item building process.
    buildCooldownMessage(long, Map) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a message for players who are currently on login cooldown.
    buildCooldownMessage(long, FileConfiguration) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.paper.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a message informing the player they are on cooldown due to excessive attempts.
    buildErrorMessage(Map) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a generic technical error message.
    buildErrorMessage(FileConfiguration) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.paper.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a generic error message for API failures.
    buildKickMessage(VerificationResponse, FileConfiguration) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.paper.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a kick message based on the API verification response.
    buildKickMessage(VerificationResponse, Map) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a kick message for a failed verification attempt.
    buildReverificationFailureMessage(Map) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a message for players who fail the background re-verification task.
    buildReverificationFailureMessage(FileConfiguration) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.paper.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a message for when a previously verified session fails re-verification.
    buildVerificationMessage(PlayerIdentity) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.paper.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a success message to be shown to the player (and potentially staff).
    buildVerificationMessage(PlayerIdentity) - Static method in class net.sylphian.verify.velocity.util.MessageUtils
    Builds a success message shown when a player is verified.
    byDescendingRarity() - Static method in class net.sylphian.minecraft.fishing.fish.Rarity
    Gets all registered rarities sorted by their catch chance in descending order (from rarest/smallest chance to most common/largest chance).
